scripts.build:mac: node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && node scripts/stage-gateway.mjs && node scripts/download-node.mjs && electron-builder build --mac
scripts.build:win: node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && node scripts/stage-gateway.mjs && node scripts/download-node.mjs && electron-builder build --win
scripts.build:linux: node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && node scripts/stage-gateway.mjs && node scripts/download-node.mjs && electron-builder build --linux
